onboardingBetaWarning: Heavy development. Nothing is guaranteed—stability, your data, or outcomes.
onboardingBody: A free learning app built around knowledge maps (trees). Pick a language and accept the privacy policy to start.
onboardingLoginSigningInBanner: Connecting to the relay network… this can take a few seconds. Please don't close or reload the tab.
onboardingPrivacyText: Your progress is saved locally. Public network features (relays), the Sage AI assistant, and other online tools are optional — they only run if you turn them on. If you use the public network, you connect to external servers where your IP will be visible.
onboardingRegisterCreatingBanner: Creating your account… this can take a few seconds. Please don't close or reload the tab.
onboardingRegisterTimeout: We couldn't confirm the account creation. The connection is taking too long. Check your internet and try again.
onboardingRegisterUsernameHint: Pick a name that identifies you online. You can rename it later from Profile.
onboardingRegisteredConfirmBody: Did you save your secret code? Without it you cannot sign in on another device or recover this account.
onboardingRegisteredQrHint: Scan this QR from another device to sign in without typing.
onboardingRegisteredSubtitle: Save this code before you continue. You'll need it to sign in on other devices.
onboardingSessionRegisterSub: Sync your trees and progress across devices
onboardingSessionSignInSub: I already have an account on another device
onboardingSessionSubtitle: Pick how you want to start. You can change this any time from Profile.
